data.body: FORCE_CLOSE: close gate(s) bypassed by user approval — no completion/signature attestation was signed. Reason: "Experiment/throwaway ('delete me'). Closed rather than deleted: hard-deleting REB-695 caused the reconciler to OUTBOUND RE-CREATE it as REB-777 (resurrection). A closed/Done pair is stable and out of the fetcher's active scope; deletion is not. Deeper root cause tracked by c244 (Jira hard-delete -> outbound re-create). See jira-reb-695 removal notes.". Session: 335612d4f.
